expectations.text: Uses mindos CLI to save debugging experience note
Structured note includes: problem description, root cause, solution, prevention tips
expectations.evidence: Content has Problem, Symptoms, Root Cause, Solution, Prevention Rules (4 rules), Debugging Approach, Related Patterns, Tags sections.

expectations.text: Recognizes this as experience capture / lessons learned scenario
expectations.evidence: Step 1 maps to 'Retrospective / distill' in decision tree and identifies Experience capture post-task hook.
